case_id: gc-XXX  (leave as-is; add_calib_case.py --append assigns the next id)
query: The question the RAG user asked.
answer: The generated answer to be diagnosed.
expected_primary_failure: ONE of the FailureType enum values (see taxonomy_support_tiers.json)
expected_stage: RETRIEVAL | GROUNDING | CITATION | GENERATION | SECURITY | NONE
expected_root_cause: One-sentence, evidence-backed reason this is the primary failure.
split: unset  (use train/dev for scored; reserve heldout for double-labelled cases)
notes: How this case was created and any labelling caveats. Do NOT write TODO/placeholder for a real case.
